texto: It did, in Scandinavia. When I first became prime minister 15 years ago, it was a cultural shock to many Norwegians. Today, four- year-olds ask their mommies: "but can a man be prime minister?" -Fourth World Conference on Women
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Gro Haarlem Brundtland que provoca temas ligados a tempo. Ao questionar “It did, in Scandinavia. When I first became prime minister 15 years ago, it was a cultural shock …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre tempo, feminism, politics, com foco em politics.
